name: @etl/sdk
description: Plugin SDK for ETL Platform - develop custom transforms, sources, and sinks in TypeScript that compile to WebAssembly

scripts.example:transform: mkdir -p dist/examples && esbuild examples/replay-matrix-transform/replay-matrix-v1.ts --bundle --platform=neutral --format=cjs --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/examples/replay-matrix-v1.js && extism-js dist/examples/replay-matrix-v1.js -i plugin-transform.d.ts -o dist/examples/replay-matrix-v1.wasm
scripts.example:source: mkdir -p dist/examples && esbuild examples/feishu-sheet-source/feishu-sheet-source.ts --bundle --platform=neutral --format=cjs --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/examples/feishu-sheet-source.js && extism-js dist/examples/feishu-sheet-source.js -i plugin-source.d.ts -o dist/examples/feishu-sheet-source.wasm
